content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Hospitable: Chief Financial Officer (Remote) Anywhere in the World Management and Finance Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5699/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York, United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://hospitable.com">https://hospitable.com</a> </p> <p>TLDR; We build software for short-term rentals to rent themselves, with a state-of-the-art product and user experience.</p> <p>We have crafted an Applicant Handbook, which we highly recommend you check out, where you can find out more about the company, culture, how we recruit, what we do, and how we do it: <a href="https://hsptb.com/hndbk" class="external">https://hsptb.com/hndbk</a></p> <p>Hospitable is a remote-only, global, and trust-based company. We believe exceptional work comes from exceptional people — no matter their background, geography, or path. Our team spans continents, cultures, and experiences, and that diversity is one of our biggest advantages. We move fast, think boldly, and build with intention.</p> <p>Our product is loved. Our customers are vocal. Our roadmap moves fast.</p> <p>Feel free to join one of our upcoming public, bi-weekly Town Halls on YouTube to get a glimpse of it for yourself: <a href="https://hsptb.com/twnhll" class="external">https://hsptb.com/twnhll</a></p> <p>We are looking for a Chief Financial Officer to bring world-class financial leadership to a profitable, international, multi-entity company. Your mission: turn finance into an engine for growth — funding the right bets, scaling operations with discipline, and building lasting value for our team and our investors. You will report to the CEO.</p> <p></p> <h3>What you will own</h3> <p><strong>Capital and growth</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own how we deploy capital, and make the case — internally and externally — for the bets worth making.</li> <li>Give leadership the clarity to invest with conviction and the discipline to scale operations profitably.</li> </ul> <p><strong>The financial future of the company</strong></p> <ul> <li>Build the long-term value of the business and the opportunities for liquidity that come with it, for our team and our investors.</li> <li>Be the financial principal of the company to the outside world — the counterpart investors, partners, banks, and auditors deal with.</li> </ul> <p><strong>A world-class finance function</strong></p> <ul> <li>Build, hire, and lead a deliberately lean, AI-leveraged finance organization across our international group.</li> <li>Set the standard for how finance operates, partners with the business, and earns trust company-wide.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements</strong></p> <p>Hospitable is a remote-only and distributed company. You should have a strongly daily overlap across EMEA and US Eastern timezones. You will report to the CEO.</p> <p>Don't tick all the boxes? Talk to us about why you're still an amazing fit. Here's what we're paying attention to:</p> <ul> <li>A CFO who has led finance through real scale and built lasting value for a company and its shareholders.</li> <li>Deep international, multi-entity, multi-currency experience.</li> <li>Command of cross-border tax and compliance, including US indirect tax.</li> <li>A recognized accounting qualification (ACCA, ACA, CIMA, or a locally accredited CPA), with real FP&amp;A and modelling depth.</li> <li>Proactive communication, high ownership, and strong autonomy in a fast-moving remote environment.</li> </ul> <p>Extra special kudos if you have:</p> <ul> <li>SaaS-enabled marketplace experience: forecasting both transactional GBV and recurring revenue.</li> <li>Travel, hospitality, or proptech sector experience.</li> <li>Built a finance function from founder-run to institutional-grade.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Benefits</strong></p> <ul><li>A supportive, radically transparent, and caring team environment, where you are trusted, not managed—and a culture that is focused on results and output.</li></ul> <ul> <li> <strong>Cash.</strong> The total cash budget for this role is up to US$312,000 per year, depending on the cost of living in your location. We can hire talent internationally as contractors—or employees if you are based in the United States, the European Union, the United Kingdom, or Australia, taking into account payroll taxes to determine your gross compensation.</li> <li> <strong>Stock.</strong> A significant equity stake through our $HOST token (RSUs): a grant valued at US$436,800, vesting over four years (≈ US$109,200.00 per year). You share directly in the long-term upside you help create.</li> <li>For US employees: healthcare (including EPO, PPO and HSA), 401(k).</li> <li>35 days off per year, encouraged (including self-serve public holidays) and parental leave.</li> <li>Complimentary mental health and emotional support with therapists on call through Slack by Spill.</li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hospitable-chief-financial-officer-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hospitable-chief-financial-officer-remote</a></p> Tue, 30 Jun 2026 12:54:59 +0000 Thu, 30 Jul 2026 12:54:59 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hospitable-chief-financial-officer-remote https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hospitable-chief-financial-officer-remote budgetsbytammy.com: Remote Brand Ambassador I Flexible Schedule I Commission-Based Anywhere in the World Alabama Communication Skills All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5692/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://budgetsbytammy.com">https://budgetsbytammy.com</a> </p> <h2>Help people improve their financial future while earning commission from anywhere.</h2> <h2>Budgets by Tammy is looking for Remote Brand Ambassadors to refer individuals and families interested in personalized budgeting services.</h2> <h2>This is a flexible, remote, commission-based opportunity. &nbsp; Work on your own schedule and earn commission for every completed client referral. &nbsp;No financial experience is required. &nbsp;We provide guidance and marketing support to help you succeed. &nbsp;</h2> <h2>If you're motivated, professional, and enjoy helping others, we'd love to hear from you. &nbsp;</h2> <h2>Apply today at https://budgetsbytammy.com</h2> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/budgetsbytammy-com-remote-brand-ambassador-i-flexible-schedule-i-commission-based">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/budgetsbytammy-com-remote-brand-ambassador-i-flexible-schedule-i-commission-based</a></p> Mon, 29 Jun
